type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: gasoline is added to our product ethanol at about 2% strength. Benzene is a percentage component of the gasoline supply [based on MSDS data] and determined total quantity of benzene that was added to product sent out.
SOx emission did not meet report threshold, but is being reported to show overall change from 2009 report.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emission tests in mid-2009 showed lower emission rate for stack source than previous engineering estimate. this reduced overall emission by 72% and below reporting threshold limit.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emission testing provided updated emission values.
new reporting to TRA

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Acid is used for pH adjustment within the ethanol production process. It is reported as 100% H2SO4. The acid is neutralized and results in no waste disposal requirements.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: A component of gasoline [1.0% per MSDS] which is a dentaurant added to our product ethanol for customers.  Total npahthalene as formulation component was 27.47 tonnes.
first year reporting

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: it is a constituent in gasoline and gasoline is added to our producy ethanol for delivery to our fuel supply customers.  From MSDS data nd from amount of gasoline used, it was determined that cumene meets reporting threshold for 2010.
first year reporting.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Cumene content in gasoline is 1.0% from MSDS and based on fuel used, total cumene through process was 27.47 tonnes. Contained in product to customer.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: ammonia usage was 292.9 tonnes as 100% NH3. It is used to control pH and to add nitrogen to the fermentation process to aid in conversion of sugars to ethanol. The ammonia is neutralized or consumed in the process, therefore, there is no loss of material
emission was below report threshold but is being voluntarily reported to show reduction from 2009 report.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emission tests in May 2009 provided lower emission rates for all stack and point releases than previous engineering estimates.  This reduced total release by 65% and put TPM below reporting threshold limit.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: all roads are paved so removed sources from this aspect which reduced emissions by 62% from previous year. Also reduced emission rates based on point source emission testing.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: From 2009 emission rate testing on baghouse systems, assumed all TPM emitted would be PM2.5.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: from stack emission testing in mid-2009 determined that PM2.5 would exceed the threshold report value of 300 kg.
Reporting to TRA.
